settings.heading: Anniversary Crystal Awards & Mementos
settings.subheading: Mark a company or personal milestone with an elegant anniversary crystal award — engraved with years, names and a message. Premium keepsakes custom-made by Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: An anniversary crystal award marks a milestone elegantly — engraved with the years (e.g. "25 Years"), name and a message, from around ₹750. Ideal for company anniversaries, work milestones and personal celebrations. Meru Trophy makes them custom. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The right award for the moment
settings.text: Anniversaries deserve something that lasts. A K9 crystal award engraved with the milestone years, name and a heartfelt line is timeless — for company foundation days, long-service milestones and personal anniversaries. Add a logo or photo for extra meaning.

settings.title: Logo or photo
settings.text: Company logo or a personal photo.

settings.title: Single or sets
settings.text: One award or a co-ordinated batch.

settings.question: What should an anniversary award say?
settings.answer: The milestone years, the name (person or company), the date, and a short congratulatory message; add a logo if corporate.

settings.question: Is crystal best for anniversaries?
settings.answer: Crystal's clarity and weight suit milestone celebrations; wood is a warmer alternative.

settings.question: Can you do company-wide long-service sets?

settings.heading: Planning an anniversary?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, recipient and date — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
